UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the NexBot application, which can be either a registered user or a temporary guest.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

displayName.description: A user-friendly name chosen by or assigned to the user profile.

isGuest.description: Indicates whether this user profile is for a temporary guest session (true) or a persistent user (false).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

lastActiveAt.description: Timestamp of the last known activity for this user profile.

ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: Represents a single, continuous conversation thread between a user and the AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatSession entity.

title.description: A user-editable title or a generated summary for the chat session, making it easier to identify in history.

isPinned.description: Flag to indicate if the chat session is pinned to the top of the list.

isArchived.description: Flag to indicate if the chat session is moved to the archives and hidden from the main list.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat session was first initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the chat session was last updated, typically when a new message was added.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents an individual message within a ChatSession, sent by either the user or the AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

senderType.description: Indicates who sent the message, e.g., 'user' or 'ai'.

content.description: The textual content of the message.

timestamp.description: The exact time the message was sent or received within the chat session, used for ordering.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles, including details for both registered and guest users. Each document ID (`userId`) corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes 'isGuest' to identify temporary profiles.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the user.

definition.description: Stores individual chat sessions (conversations) for a specific user. Each document ID (`chatSessionId`) identifies a unique conversation thread. Access is restricted to the owning user, whose ID is denormalized in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the owner of this chat session.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat session.

definition.description: Stores individual messages within a specific chat session. Each document ID (`messageId`) identifies a single message. Access is restricted to the owning user of the parent chat session, with user and session IDs denormalized in the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the owner of the parent chat session.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent chat session.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat message.
